builtin.name: Whisper STT
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: Speech-to-text powered by OpenAI Whisper. Runs locally with faster-whisper or connects to the OpenAI API. Supports models from base to large-v3.

builtin.name: Kokoro TTS
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: High-quality local text-to-speech using the Kokoro model. 15+ voices across American and British English. No cloud API required.

builtin.name: KokoClone Voice Cloning
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: Clone any voice from a short audio sample. Built on PyTorch and Kokoro with a dedicated Flask server. Downloads ~2GB of models on first use.

builtin.name: Claude CLI
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: Use Claude Code CLI as a chat provider inside OwnTerm. Requires the claude CLI installed and authenticated on your machine.

builtin.name: Persona Manager
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: Create, edit, import, export, and browse community personas. Includes a gallery for discovering and installing personas from the community.

builtin.name: ChromaDB Memory
builtin.author: OwnTerm
builtin.description: Semantic vector memory powered by ChromaDB and all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings. Replaces keyword search with AI-powered retrieval, deduplication, contradiction detection, and temporal decay.

community.name: ElevenLabs TTS
community.author: OwnTerm Community
community.description: Premium text-to-speech via the ElevenLabs API. 8 pre-configured voices, multilingual support, usage tracking with free-tier limits. Requires an ElevenLabs API key.

community.name: Audio Processor
community.author: OwnTerm Community
community.description: Professional audio preprocessing before STT — spectral noise reduction, echo cancellation, voice EQ, and compression. Runs automatically when enabled alongside Whisper.

community.name: D&D Game Master
community.author: OwnTerm Community
community.description: Comprehensive D&D 5e Game Master with campaigns, character sheets, combat tracking, dice rolling, NPCs, world lore, quests, and battle grids. Much enhanced with ChromaDB Memory for semantic recall of game events.
